core_ensemble.name: Rania Ahmed
core_ensemble.description: Rania Ahmed is a celebrated stage actor with over 12 years of experience in classical and contemporary theatre. Known for her emotional depth and commanding presence.

core_ensemble.name: Hamza Qureshi
core_ensemble.description: Hamza Qureshi is an innovative director focusing on visual storytelling and ensemble rhythm. His productions often blend classical texts with modern aesthetics.

core_ensemble.name: Misha Tariq
core_ensemble.description: Misha Tariq is a composer and vocal director who creates evocative soundscapes for stage. She integrates folk and electronic elements to enhance dramatic moments.
awards: Best Original Score - Lahore Music Festival 2023

core_ensemble.name: Saad Noman
core_ensemble.description: Saad Noman is a playwright and adaptation specialist, known for his gripping narratives that explore social issues. His works have been staged across Pakistan.
awards: Best New Play - Karachi Theatre Festival 2022

core_ensemble.name: Areeba Khan
core_ensemble.description: Areeba Khan is a versatile performer recognized for her expressive character arcs and precision in ensemble scenes. She has worked in both Urdu and English productions.

core_ensemble.name: Faris Malik
core_ensemble.description: Faris Malik designs large-scale, immersive stage sets that transform the theatrical space. He combines minimalist aesthetics with functional innovation.
awards: Best Set Design - National Theatre Awards 2023

core_ensemble.name: Noor Abbas
core_ensemble.description: Noor Abbas is a resident director for the youth theatre circuit, nurturing new talent and directing socially relevant plays for young audiences.

core_ensemble.name: Hira Hassan
core_ensemble.description: Hira Hassan is a lighting designer known for her atmospheric use of light and shadow in dark-stage productions. She has collaborated with leading directors across the country.
shows: The Woman in Black (2022) - Lighting Designer

core_ensemble.name: Taha Aslam
core_ensemble.description: Taha Aslam is a script consultant and dramaturg, specializing in multilingual productions and adaptation of international works for local audiences.
shows: The Good Person of Szechwan (2021) - Adaptation
